description: Read-only discovery and blog search for luisalejandro.org. No authenticated or transactional tools.

tools.name: search_blog_posts
tools.title: Search blog posts
tools.description: Search published blog posts by title, teaser, or category. Read-only; max query length 128 characters.

tools.name: get_latest_posts
tools.title: Get latest blog posts
tools.description: Returns the most recent published blog posts (read-only).

limit.description: Number of posts to return (default: 5, max: 20)

tools.name: get_site_discovery
tools.title: Site discovery metadata
tools.description: Returns canonical discovery URLs for llms.txt, sitemap, feeds, API catalog, and MCP.
